title: Tasty Toasted Moroccan Bread Tagine
description: A funky and crumbly weeknight Moroccan dish featuring bread and lardons, rendered in a satvik-friendly way, this recipe is perfect for a quick dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the Moroccan bread into 1 inch cubes and toast until lightly browned.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and render the lardons until crispy.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the toasted bread cubes to the skillet and stir to combine with the lardon mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes, or until the bread is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
